rationale: Implements three roadmap items in a React + FullCalendar team-schedule app. (1) Adds French (fr-FR) locale alongside English/Portuguese, integrates `i18next-browser-languagedetector` so en*/pt*/fr* browser languages map to supported locales with English fallback and persisted to localStorage. New LanguageSwitcher dropdown replaces the prior LanguageToggle and shows checkmark on active language. FullCalendar locale picked via new getFullCalendarLocale helper; time formatting uses pt-BR/fr-FR/en-US per language with 12-hour clock only for English. (2) Replaces inline `error` state + `<AlertCircle>` text under the team form with `useToast()` toasts (green success / red error bottom-right). Every API success/error path in App.tsx now calls `showToast(t('notifications.teamAdded' | 'teamAddError' | 'teamRemoved' | 'teamRemoveError' | 'eventAdded' | 'eventAddError' | 'eventRemoved' | 'eventRemoveError' | 'loadError'), 'success'|'error')` instead of setError. (3) Adds delete-shift functionality: EventDialog gains a Delete button with inline confirm via handleDeleteEvent, and the calendar gets a handleQuickDelete (window.confirm + handleDeleteEvent) for the red-X on hover. Also refactors several inline `(e: any)` handlers to typed `DateSelectArg/EventClickArg/EventDropArg/EventResizeDoneArg/EventContentArg/EventMountArg` from @fullcalendar/core, extracts utilities into utils/eventDates.ts, calendarEvents.ts, monthEventResize.ts, fullCalendarLocale.ts, and i18n/languages.ts. Clean feature work matching the PR body's stated priorities.
